description: Execute the first proxy run for the gated architecture family at K=128 to establish whether this new family deserves incubation.
self_review: No new code changes this round. This is intentionally a clean first measurement of the gated family before adding family-specific sweeps or cost work.

description: Crash-recovery proxy run: use TopK at the K=128 anchor with a modest LR reduction to re-establish a stable quality baseline.
self_review: This does not advance architecture exploration, but crash recovery mode requires a conservative parameter-only step on the current best working setup. The main limitation is that it prioritizes stability over a large FVU jump this round.
